FSM_LOG

Logging table for the finite state machine, populated by PIT output module PIT_FSM.

Columns
fsl_id (`number`)

Primary key, populated by PIT.

fsl_fsm_id (`number`)

ID of the referenced FSM object.

fsl_user_name (according to `pit_util.ora_name_type`)

Username that created this log entry.

fsl_session_id (`varchar2(64 byte)`)

Session ID of the session that created this entry.

fsl_log_date (`timestamp(6)`)

Timestamp of the log entry.

fsl_msg_text (`clob`)

Generated message text.

fsl_severity (`number`)

Severity of the log entry.

fsl_fst_id (according to `pit_util.ora_name_type`)

Actual state the FSM object is in.

fsl_fev_list (`varchar2(200 char)`)

List of allowed events that can be raised on the FSM object.

fsl_fcl_id (according to `pit_util.ora_name_type`)

Type of the FSM object, reference to FSM_CLASSES.

fsl_fsc_id (according to `pit_util.ora_name_type`)

Subtype of the FSM object, reference to FSM_SUB_CLASSES.

fsl_msg_id (according to `pit_util.ora_name_type`)

Name of the PIT message, used to display the log in a different language.

fsl_msg_args (`msg_args_char`)

Optional message arguments.

Dependencies
fsl_fsm_id

references FSM_OBJECTS (fsm_id)

fsl_fcl_id

references FSM_CLASSES (fcl_id)

fsl_fsc_id, fsl_fcl_id

references FSM_SUB_CLASSES (fsc_id, fsc_fcl_id)
